steps.title: Translate each point source
steps.content: Each draw earns $1$ point, so $d$ draws earn $d$ points. Each win earns $4$ points, so $w$ wins earn $4w$ points.

steps.title: Set the total points
steps.content:
The participant has earned $46$ points total, so add the points from draws and wins.
$$d+4w=46$$
The swapped expression would give draws $4$ points and wins $1$ point. The answer is A.
